scripts.pack:__NOTE__: WARNING: 'pack' skips the runtime archive step, so the vendor runtime will not be hydrated and the gateway will fail to start. Use scripts/test-local.sh for a working packaged build.
scripts.dist:mac: node scripts/assert-build-artifacts.cjs && node scripts/create-runtime-archive.cjs && electron-builder --mac --publish never
scripts.dist:mac:arm64: node scripts/assert-build-artifacts.cjs && node scripts/create-runtime-archive.cjs && electron-builder --mac dmg --arm64 --publish never && node scripts/sign-arm64.cjs
scripts.dist:win: node scripts/assert-build-artifacts.cjs && node scripts/create-runtime-archive.cjs && electron-builder --win --config electron-builder.win.yml --publish never
scripts.dist:linux: node scripts/assert-build-artifacts.cjs && node scripts/create-runtime-archive.cjs && electron-builder --linux --config electron-builder.linux.yml --publish never
